Personal site pages

This page collects the parts of the GitHub Pages site that support the resume experience. Use it for small site features, future portfolio pages, or concise project write-ups.

Current pages
  • Resume homepage
  • Assignment page
Good next additions

  • Links to GitHub or demo sites
  • A simple changelog for the personal site
Built as a GitHub Pages resume landing page.
